professional_summary: Aspiring Data Engineer with hands-on experience in PySpark, SQL, and Azure , Airflow, now expanding into Generative AI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and LLM-based data systems.

projects.title: Stock Data Pipeline using Airflow
description: Developed an end-to-end data pipeline to ingest stock market data from APIs.
Processed and transformed data using Python for reliable and structured storage.
Analyzed stock trends to derive meaningful insights for decision            -making.
Orchestrated the pipeline using Apache Airflow for automated and scalable execution.

projects.title: End-to-End Azure Data Pipeline with RAG Integration
description: Built an ETL pipeline to ingest on      -prem data into ADLS using Azure Data Factory.
Performed data transformations using PySpark with Bronze, Silver, and                 Gold architecture.
Designed structured datasets to support efficient querying and analytics.
Implemented a RAG-based solution using LangChain to enable natural language querying on processed data.

projects.title: Aadhaar Data Analysis – UIDAI Data Hackathon
description: Processed and cleaned 50+ lakh records using PySpark and SQL.
Handled missing values, duplicates, and inconsistent region mappings.
Built dashboards for demographic and anomaly analy              sis.
Delivered insights for large-scale government dataset optimization.

achievements: Solved 200+ LeetCode problems focused on Data Structures & Algorithms.
Strong interest in ETL automation, cloud-native data architecture, and large                   -scale distributed processing.
